strategy: Solo-friendly (6,025 health). Never hit Fire; he resists it 80%. Hit with Ice, his boost school.
Do not trap him: any harmful ward triggers Brimstone Revenant on you, and all-enemies traps trigger it too.
Do not shield: any helpful ward makes him Helephant the recipient, and all-allies shields hit the caster.
Clear or AoE the Siren minion alongside him.
Stack Ice blades (charms are safe), skip traps and shields, then land one big Ice hit.
cheatNotes: Putting a trap or weakness on Teles gets you hit with Brimstone Revenant. Blade instead of trap.
An all-enemies trap, like a group Feint, still triggers it.
Casting any shield makes Teles hit the shielded wizard with Helephant.
An all-allies shield triggers it too, hitting the caster.
